name: Chicken Curry#2
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine coconut milk with curry base over medium heat until oil appears on top.
2. Add chicken and season with fish sauce, lemon juice. Stir occasionally for 5 minutes.
3. Add remaining ingredients (tomatoes, scallions, mushrooms, pepper) except garlic chili sauce. Cover and simmer for 5 minutes.
4. Add garlic chili sauce to taste. Cover and simmer an additional 2 minutes.
5. Serve hot over rice, garnished with fresh sweet basil sprigs.
